decisions.evidence: reference/mieske2007/ReadMe.txt states d=43 Mpc and identifies the Centaurus galaxy cluster
decisions.legacy_value_disposition: replace incorrect 3.8 Mpc Centaurus A default while preserving it in raw payloads

decisions.evidence: reference/blakeslee2008/ReadMe.txt identifies Abell S0740 at redshift 0.034
decisions.legacy_value_disposition: retain as approximate source context, not an object-level distance measurement

decisions.evidence: reference/misgeld2011/ReadMe.txt identifies the Hydra I cluster and NGC 3311 sample

decisions.legacy_value_disposition: retain as approximate source context, not an object-level distance measurement

decisions.evidence: reference/liu2015/ReadMe.txt separates the M87, M49, and M60 primary tables
decisions.legacy_value_disposition: retain 16.5 Mpc only for the 127 M87 rows; keep M49 and M60 distances null rather than propagate one Virgo-wide value

decisions.evidence: reference/fahrion2019/tableb1.dat and ReadMe.txt define a heterogeneous literature compilation with per-row hosts but no line-of-sight distance column
decisions.legacy_value_disposition: clear unsafe blanket 20 Mpc normalized default while preserving it in raw payloads

decisions.evidence: reference/voggel2020/ReadMe.txt identifies the primary Gaia catalog as a Centaurus A sample
decisions.legacy_value_disposition: retain for the 632 primary rows; supporting/reference rows preserve their own source normalization

decisions.evidence: reference/saifollahi2021/ReadMe.txt identifies a Fornax-cluster search and its distance-dependent absolute-magnitude limit
reference/dumont2022/ReadMe.txt identifies the NGC 5128 sample and an adopted distance modulus
